name: rust-diagnostics
description: Full warning-elimination pipeline for Rust projects following Li et al. (arXiv:2310.11738). Three skills: warn-identify (measure density), warn-reduce (iterative Pareto elimination to 18/KLOC), and zerowarns (compiler-guaranteed semantic rewrite of arithmetic_side_effects and as_conversions to 0).

tools.name: rust-diagnostics
tools.description: Embed Clippy diagnostics as inline comments and analyse warning-fix patches in git history.

tools.name: zerowarns
tools.description: Type-aware semantic rewriter that eliminates clippy::arithmetic_side_effects and clippy::as_conversions without LLM or #[allow] suppression.
